prestazioni: Engine swap to a **RenaultSport F4R 874 (2.0L 16V Turbo from the Mégane II RS 225 Cup)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger**, forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods), and a **Toda Racing F4R-specific camshaft kit (272° duration, 10.5mm lift)** for 320+ HP on E85. Custom **3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust with a Milltek Sport 4-2-1 header** and **Akrapovič rear section** for optimal turbo spool and sound tuning.

Full **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Avantime-specific valving)** with **Eibach Pro-Series anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** and **Powerflex Black Series polyurethane bushings (subframe, control arms, and trailing arms)** to eliminate chassis flex and improve turn-in response. **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm discs front, 330mm rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for fade-resistant braking.

**Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** and **Motec C125 dash** for real-time tuning. **Nissan 350Z fuel pump (340 LPH)** with **ID1000 injectors** and a **Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator** to support E85. **Mocal oil cooler (19-row)** and **Setrab 50-row transmission cooler** to prevent heat soak under track use.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny Avantime-specific widebody kit (Pandem front bumper, custom rear fenders, and side skirts)** with **carbon fiber overfenders** to fit **Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +25 wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (265/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear)**. **Custom carbon fiber hood with dual NACA ducts** for engine bay cooling and aggressive stance.

**Full custom LED lighting conversion**: **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes (6000K)** with **Morimoto XB35 HID projectors** and **Dapper Lighting sequential LED taillights** (OEM Avantime housing retrofit). **Carbon fiber mirror caps (Seibon)** and **debadged grille with a custom 3D-printed RenaultSport emblem** for a stealth RS look.

**Interior overhaul with**: **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara inserts)** mounted on **Sparco Pro ADV rails**, **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)** with **NRG quick-release hub**, and **custom rear seat delete (carbon fiber panel with storage compartments)**. **Full Alcantara headliner, door cards, and dashboard wrap** with **red contrast stitching** and **custom LED ambient lighting (Philips Hue integration)**.
